<explanation>
The flower in the Target Image has a large, open bloom with multiple white petals and a prominent yellow center. The petals are broad, slightly ruffled at the edges, and the overall structure is symmetrical with a layered appearance. These features closely match the visual characteristics of the labeled examples for class **77**, which also depict white lotus-like flowers with similar petal shapes and yellow centers. The other classes (45 and 44) show distinctly different colors and structures: class 45 has bright orange/yellow flowers with a different petal arrangement, and class 44 features purple flowers with a darker center and narrower petals.
</explanation>

<response>77</response>
